mnemonics.title: TLS Handshake Steps
mnemonics.content: CANS: Cipher suite, Authentication, Negotiation, Secure channel

visualTips.visualization: Imagine TLS as a secure tunnel between browser (top) and TCP layer (bottom)
Transport mode: Protective shield around data. Tunnel mode: Full armored vehicle

analogies.analogy: Like diplomatic protocol before heads of state meet: verify identities, agree on security measures
Secure military convoy with lead armored vehicle (IKE) and encrypted cargo trucks (ESP)
